	Responsible for product repair, testing and maintenance to ensure functionality.

	Familiar with the Installation of both on-grid and off-grid solar installation.

	Minimum of 1 year of practical experience as an Aftersales Engineer in a solar company.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Willing to do on-site/field works.
	Excellent time management, Communication and customer relationship management skill.
	Familiar with electric circuit faults.

After Sales Engineer Job at Beebeejump International Limited




        
    

        
        Beebeejump International Limited is into the sales of Solar batteries, inverters, panels and other accessories.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: After Sales Engineer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Responsible for product repair, testing and maintenance to ensure functionality.
	Able to read and interpret electronic circuit diagrams and analyze faults based on these diagrams.
	Proficient in using soldering iron and other repair tools to solder and replace motherboard hardware.
	Communicate with customers and technical team to address aftersales technical issues.
	Maintain detailed service logs and reports.
	Coordinate with the engineering team for system checks and upgrades.
	Familiar with the Installation of both on-grid and off-grid solar installation.


Requirements / Qualifications


	Graduate of Electrical / Electronics Engineering or any course in related field.
	Minimum of 1 year of practical experience as an Aftersales Engineer in a solar company.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Willing to do on-site/field works.
	Excellent time management, Communication and customer relationship management skill.
	Familiar with electric circuit faults.


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: [email protected] using "After Sales Engineers" as the subject of the email.

Note: Selected applicants will be contacted via email.

Customer Experience (CX) Lead Job at Strivo Labs




        
    

        
        At Strivo Labs, we are passionate about helping businesses scale with speed and precision. We specialise in providing end-to-end digital solutions, from custom design and MVP development to automation and content creation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Experience (CX) Lead

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time 

Purpose
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced Customer Experience (CX) Lead to own and elevate end-to-end customer experience across our digital financial products and services.
	This role is critical to driving customer satisfaction, retention, trust, and long-term value in a highly regulated fintech environment.


Role Overview


	The Customer Experience Lead will design, implement, and continuously improve customer journeys across onboarding, transactions, support, and lifecycle engagement.
	You will work cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, Compliance, Operations, and Growth teams to ensure every customer interaction is seamless, compliant, and aligned with business goals.


Responsibilities


	Own the end-to-end customer experience strategy across all touchpoints
	Design and optimize customer journeys for fintech products and services
	Lead customer support and experience teams to deliver high-quality service
	Define and track CX KPIs including NPS, CSAT, churn, resolution time, and retention
	Partner with Product and Engineering to translate customer feedback into product improvements
	Ensure customer experience processes comply with financial regulations and internal controls
	Implement customer feedback loops, surveys, and voice-of-customer programs
	Handle escalations and resolve complex customer issues professionally and efficiently
	Drive process automation and efficiency across customer support operations
	Develop CX playbooks, training materials, and service standards


Required Experience & Skills:


	5–8+ years of experience in customer experience, customer success, or operations
	Mandatory experience in fintech or financial services (banking, payments, lending, digital finance)
	Strong understanding of regulated environments (KYC, AML, consumer protection)
	Proven experience managing CX or support teams
	Strong analytical skills with ability to interpret customer and operational data
	Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and problem-solving skills
	Ability to balance customer advocacy with business and compliance requirements
	Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Communications, or related field


Nice to Have:


	Experience working with digital banking, payments, lending, or investment products
	Familiarity with CRM, ticketing, and CX tools (Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom, HubSpot, etc.)
	Experience scaling CX operations in a fast-growing fintech
	Certifications in customer experience or service management


What We Offer


	Leadership role with direct impact on customer trust and retention
	Opportunity to shape customer experience strategy in a growing fintech
	Collaborative, fast-paced, and impact-driven work environment

        Home Bargains Nigeria Limited is a gift and decor store situated in Abuja, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive

Job Location: Wuse Zone 1, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a strategic and results-driven Sales & Business Development Executive to drive revenue growth across our gift and decor store.
	This role focuses on planning, coordinating, and optimizing all sales activities by working closely with the Social Media Manager, Content Creator, Sales Representatives, and Store Manager.
	The ideal candidate will translate business goals into actionable strategies, ensuring that both online and in-store efforts are aligned to maximize sales performance.


Key Responsibilities
Sales Strategy & Revenue Growth:


	Develop and implement weekly and monthly sales strategies
	Identify new revenue opportunities including product bundles, promotions, upselling, and seasonal campaigns
	Set clear sales targets and actionable plans for the team
	Continuously monitor and optimize sales performance across all channels


Business Development:


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities, partnerships, and customer segments
	Develop strategies to expand customer base and increase repeat purchases
	Analyze market trends and competitor activities to inform business decisions


Team Coordination & Leadership:


	Collaborate with the Social Media Manager and Content Creator to align content with sales objectives
	Provide direction to Sales Representatives and Store Manager on improving customer engagement and conversion
	Ensure all team members are aligned with campaigns, promotions, and business priorities
	Foster accountability and performance-driven culture within the team


Campaign Planning & Execution:


	Plan and oversee marketing campaigns, promotions, and product launches
	Ensure seamless execution across both digital and physical store channels
	Introduce creative strategies to drive urgency, foot traffic, and conversions


Performance Monitoring & Reporting:


	Track sales metrics and marketing performance indicators
	Analyze data to identify strengths, gaps, and opportunities
	Provide weekly performance reports with actionable insights and recommendations


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Monthly and weekly revenue growth
	Conversion rate improvement (online and in-store)
	Effectiveness of campaigns and promotions
	Customer acquisition and retention rates
	Team performance alignment and execution efficiency


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Sales, Economics, or a related field
	Proven experience in sales, business development, or marketing
	Strong understanding of retail sales dynamics and customer behavior
	Excellent leadership, communication, and team coordination skills
	Ability to think strategically and execute commerciallyviableideas
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
	Self-motivated, proactive, and results-oriented


Bonus:


	Experience in gift, lifestyle, or decor retail industry
	Experience working with creative/content teams
	Knowledge of promotions, pricing strategies, and customer psychology.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using “Business Development Executive” as the subject of the email.

Note: An aptitude test and portfolio review will be conducted as part of the recruitment process.
